query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN rollerBookingRef IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as from_roller, SUM(CASE WHEN rollerBookingRef IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as manual FROM guestSessions WHERE DATE(createdAt) = CURDATE();
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KjT5kGWaGHMws6.75433b4e530a --database aMDMXCoQ2ycSYTjhkKKJzm --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN rollerBookingRef IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as from_roller, SUM(CASE WHEN rollerBookingRef IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as manual FROM guestSessions WHERE DATE(createdAt) = CURDATE();
